purpose: Hard-stop private-video production recovery when Cloudflare Pages production lacks the FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 binding.

bindingAudit.message: Cloudflare Pages production is missing FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 binding; private-video upload, publish, access-change and archive cannot recover from KV write quota with R2 fallback.

remediation: In Cloudflare Pages project lghui-fluid-learning, bind production R2 bucket as FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA.
Keep FM_AUDIT KV bound in production.
Redeploy Pages after the binding is saved.
Only after real teacher and student browser QA pass may private-video production recovery be claimed.

acceptance.meaning: The hard-stop is active: missing FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA is recorded as a blocker instead of being hidden by UI/mock success.
